subagents.title: W2-AG Scoring Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a scoring/evaluation systems engineer. Design per-agent scoring schemas and statistically sound reporting bundles. Prioritize deterministic outputs, payload backward compatibility, and explicit edge-case tests. You must specify exact response fields for server payloads and SSE emission.

parsed_output.summary: Add agent_scores payload and enhance reporting bundle stats in server evaluation.

code_changes.purpose: Introduce agent_scores payload for comprehensive evaluation metrics.
operations: Add agent_scores field to the result payload structure
Implement reliability adjustment logic based on new scoring criteria
Integrate reporting bundle stats aggregation to include new metrics
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Agent_scores field is optional; existing metrics will remain accessible under previous keys.

code_changes.purpose: Extend payload schema to include agent_scores.
operations: Add scoring structure to message schema
Include new statistics fields as part of the reporting bundle
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Old message contracts remain intact, with new fields added to the schema.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_integration
tests.asserts: agent_scores are included correctly in the evaluation payload

tests.name: test_reliability_adjustment
tests.asserts: reliability adjustments correctly impact reported scores

tests.name: test_backward_compatibility
tests.asserts: legacy payload structure remains functional and accessible

risk_register.risk: Potential incompatibility with existing workflows relying on previous payload schema
risk_register.mitigation: Implement optional new fields and adjust parsing logic accordingly
risk_register.validation: Test against existing workflows to ensure no disruption occurs.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass, including backward-compatibility checks.

Clarify the mitigation validation process in risk management for existing workflows.
Consider specifying file paths for potential additional test files to strengthen test coverage.

subagents.title: W2-UI Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a frontend engineer for React+TypeScript dashboards. Design compatibility-aware UI states and transparent score breakdown UX tied to backend payloads. Include explicit disabled/empty/error states and test assertions for hard gate visibility.

parsed_output.summary: Implement dataset selector and score breakdown functionality with backward compatibility and edge-case coverage.

code_changes.purpose: Implement workflow compatibility checks for the dataset selector to disable options accordingly.
operations: Rename function fetchDatasets to fetchCompatibleDatasets for clarity
Add state management for disabled datasets based on API payload
code_changes.compatibility_notes: The existing dataset selection behavior remains unchanged; if the API request fails or no compatible datasets are found, the previous state is preserved.

code_changes.purpose: Display score breakdown with explicit handling for hard-gate failures.
operations: Extend payload handling in useEffect for scoring data with fallback options
Add explicit error states and loading indicators for robustness
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Hard-gate checks are added without removing existing scoring display logic; legacy score data is displayed when new data isn't available.

tests.name: DatasetSelector renders disabled options correctly
tests.asserts: Correct datasets are disabled based on compatibility from API response

tests.name: ScoreBreakdownPanel displays grades and hard-gate failures
tests.asserts: Score breakdown is rendered with correct grades or displays an error state on failure

tests.name: Fallback behavior for missing scoring data
tests.asserts: Previous valid score data is displayed when new data fails to load

risk_register.risk: Inconsistent state management of dataset selections
risk_register.mitigation: Ensure that all state updates are made based on the latest API response and include fallback handling
risk_register.validation: Run integration tests to check if the state remains stable across various API responses

acceptance_checks: DatasetSelector correctly disables options based on compatibility

subagents.title: W2-AD Adapter Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are an integration adapter engineer. Design framework adapters with strict contract conformance and graceful optional dependencies. Explicitly define fallback behavior when the Microsoft SDK is unavailable.

parsed_output.summary: Implement Microsoft Agent Framework adapter with optional import behavior and canonical event mapping.

code_changes.purpose: To integrate Microsoft SDK optionally and define canonical event mapping.
operations: Added conditional import of Microsoft SDK based on availability.
Implemented fallback behavior to use default event mapping when SDK is unavailable.
Defined canonical event mapping structure for captured events.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing behavior remains stable through fallback logic; if the SDK is not available, the system defaults to predefined mappings without breaking existing workflows.

tests.name: test_microsoft_sdk_integration
tests.asserts: Check correct event mapping when Microsoft SDK is available.

tests.name: test_microsoft_sdk_fallback_behavior
tests.asserts: Ensure default event mapping is used when the Microsoft SDK is unavailable.

tests.name: test_microsoft_sdk_partial_import
tests.asserts: Verify system operates correctly with partial SDK methods.

risk_register.risk: Microsoft SDK not installed in production environment.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement robust fallback mechanism to alternative event mapping.
risk_register.validation: Perform integration tests with a simulator that mimics SDK behavior.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass under different integration scenarios.

subagents.title: Wave2 Integration Architect
subagents.focus: Cross-ticket backend+SSE+UI contract integration for W2-AG-001/W2-UI-001/W2-UI-002/W2-AD-001
subagents.system_instruction: You are a cross-layer integration architect. Align backend evaluation payloads, streaming contracts, and UI rendering types. Prevent schema drift and call out required API/type updates.

parsed_output.summary: Cross-ticket backend and UI integration for evaluation features and reporting.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload and enhance reliability adjustments for reporting.
operations: Add agent_scores field to the evaluation response payload
Implement reliability adjustments based on criteria weights
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing payload structure is preserved; new fields are additive.

code_changes.purpose: Define new payload schema for agent_scores and reporting.
operations: Extend evaluation response schema to include agent_scores
Ensure backward compatibility by making new fields optional
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Backward-compatible schema changes maintain integration stability.

code_changes.purpose: Implement dataset filtering by workflow compatibility.
operations: Add conditional logic to disable filters based on workflow
Fetch datasets using GET /api/eval/datasets?workflow=... with updated handling
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing UI behavior remains unchanged; new functionalities added conditionally.

tests.asserts: agent_scores should be present in the evaluation response

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_filters
tests.asserts: filters are disabled for incompatible workflows

risk_register.mitigation: Use feature flags to toggle new behavior while testing

adjust scoring logic to include reliability adjustments

code_changes.purpose: Define new message format for agent scores

code_changes.purpose: Implement optional import behavior for Microsoft Agent

introduce fallback to default behavior if import fails
